title: SimpleSurvival
description: Modpack geared towards QoL, Exploration and Building
body:
SimpleSurvival is a modpack which sets its focus on client optimization and exploration.

 

Get more fps with performance mods such as Sodium ot Lithium while still retaining some key Optifine feautures like for example connected textures and shaders.

Explore a world filled with new plants and animals, or dive into new dimensions such as eden ring or the new and improved end with the betterx mods.


Credit goes to haimcyfly for StayTrue texture pack: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
